districts.name: Ferryward
districts.summary: Punts knock against oath-posts while travelers negotiate which bank they promised to reach.
districts.featureDescription: Each notch records a crossing; one fresh notch records a boat that has not arrived.

districts.name: Reed Market
districts.summary: Green bundles, smoked eels, remedies, and quiet warnings change hands beneath patched awnings.
districts.featureDescription: Cloudy light makes every offered object briefly reveal who needs it most.

districts.name: Water-Shrine Quarter
districts.summary: Household bowls and willow screens make a neighborhood of small, stubborn sanctuaries.
districts.featureDescription: Rain in the basin repeats the names of households that sheltered strangers.

landmarks.name: the drowned memory mill
landmarks.description: A millwheel turns below still water, grinding forgotten names into silver silt.
